title: An. gambiae Complex Species Identification by PCR
author: Fabio Gomes
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.d7i9kd

steps.title: Perform PCR Amplification
steps.instruction: Run PCR with the following program: Hot Start: 94°C for 2 min; 30 cycles of: 94°C for 30 sec, 50°C for 30 sec, 72°C for 30 sec; Final extension: 72°C for 5 min; Hold at 4°C.

steps.title: Aliquot PCR Product
steps.instruction: Save 5 µL of the PCR product for running an agarose gel.

steps.title: Perform HhaI Restriction Digest
steps.instruction: Take 10-15 µL of PCR product and complete the volume to 17.5 µL with Nuclease-Free Water (NFW). Add 2 µL of 10x HhaI Buffer and 0.5 µL of HhaI enzyme. Incubate the reaction at 37°C overnight.

steps.title: Run Agarose Gel Electrophoresis
steps.instruction: Load the digested PCR product onto an Agarose Gel and run electrophoresis using a 100 bp ladder as a size reference.
